skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A distance of 47 furlongs is equivalent to how many feet? (1 furlong = 220 yards and 1 yard = 3 feet)
rationale: The correct answer is 31,020. Multiplying conversions: 47 furlongs · (220 yards/1 furlong) · (3 feet/1 yard) = 47 · 220 · 3 = 31,020 feet.
